QF.id: VII Introduction to Securities Broking Operations_19

question.text: Which type of order is currently NOT available on stock exchange systems as per SEBI directives?

answer.text: Good Till Cancelled (GTC) and All or None (AON)
Stop Loss Order and IOC Order
Day Order and Disclosed Quantity Order

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per SEBI directives, GTC, GTD, AON, and Minimum Fill (MF) orders are currently not available on the exchange trading systems. Available orders include: Market, Limit, Stop Loss, Day, IOC, DQ, and COL. **The Trap:** Students may assume all order types mentioned in textbooks are available. GTC, GTD, AON, and MF are defined but not currently operational. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers available order types for derivatives. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Available: Market, Limit, Stop Loss (trigger+limit/market), Day, IOC, DQ, COL. NOT available: GTC, GTD, AON, MF. This is a frequently tested fact — remember which order types are theoretical vs. operational.
